text.content: Every pet is unique — and so is every needle felted portrait I create. I hand-felt each piece from wool to capture your pet's personality and likeness. Here's how the ordering process works from start to finish in detail.

rich_text.plain_text: Every pet is unique — and so is every needle felted portrait I create. I hand-felt each piece from wool to capture your pet's personality and likeness. Here's how the ordering process works from start to finish in detail.

text.content: Frequently Asked Questions

rich_text.plain_text: Frequently Asked Questions

text.content: Can you make a portrait of a pet who has passed away?

rich_text.plain_text: Can you make a portrait of a pet who has passed away?

text.content: Absolutely. Many of my commissions are memorial portraits. I treat each one with special care and attention. Just send me your best photos and any details you'd like me to capture.

rich_text.plain_text: Absolutely. Many of my commissions are memorial portraits. I treat each one with special care and attention. Just send me your best photos and any details you'd like me to capture.

text.content: What pets can you make?

rich_text.plain_text: What pets can you make?

text.content: Dogs, cats, rabbits, birds, hamsters — you name it! I've worked with all kinds of beloved pets. If you're unsure, just reach out and ask.

rich_text.plain_text: Dogs, cats, rabbits, birds, hamsters — you name it! I've worked with all kinds of beloved pets. If you're unsure, just reach out and ask.

text.content: Do you ship internationally?

rich_text.plain_text: Do you ship internationally?

text.content: Yes! I ship worldwide. Shipping costs vary by destination and will be confirmed during consultation.

rich_text.plain_text: Yes! I ship worldwide. Shipping costs vary by destination and will be confirmed during consultation.

text.content: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?

rich_text.plain_text: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?

text.content: Your satisfaction is my priority. I send progress photos throughout the process so we can make adjustments along the way. Minor revisions after completion are included.

rich_text.plain_text: Your satisfaction is my priority. I send progress photos throughout the process so we can make adjustments along the way. Minor revisions after completion are included.

text.content: Ready to Get Started?

rich_text.plain_text: Ready to Get Started?

text.content: I'd love to create a one-of-a-kind portrait of your pet. Send me your photos and let's bring your furry friend to life in wool! Reach out through the contact form or send me a message on Instagram.
